title: festuca mongolica
intro: Festuca mongolica, also known as Mongolian fescue, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. This perennial grass has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Festuca mongolica include relieving coughs, reducing fever, and soothing sore throats, making it a valuable herb in natural remedies. In herbal preparations, Festuca mongolica is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
